title: Boundary-Aware Policy Optimization for Reliable Agentic Search

defines.name: BAPO
defines.definition: A reinforcement learning framework that improves agentic search reliability by teaching models to recognize when they are outside their reasoning boundary and should answer IDK.

problem: RL-based agentic search models often fail to admit uncertainty and produce plausible but unreliable answers when evidence is insufficient or reasoning reaches its limit.
